data.title: Planet Evening News
Hong Kong Securities Regulator Holds First Virtual Asset Advisory Group Meeting
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 14, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) convened its inaugural meeting of the Virtual Asset Advisory Group. The group is chaired by Dr. Yeh Chi-heng, Executive Director of the SFC's Intermediaries Division, and includes representatives from all licensed virtual asset trading platforms, represented by their senior management. The advisory group aims to provide valuable input to the SFC in formulating regulatory policies, thereby promoting the development of a sustainable and resilient virtual asset ecosystem. Through collaboration with its members, the group will identify policy priorities to pave the way for market and regulatory developments based on investor protection.

data.title: FBI's Operation Saves Potential Victims From Crypto Fraud
data.description: According to Foresight News, the FBI has successfully intervened in a cryptocurrency investment fraud scheme, preventing over 4,300 potential victims from losing approximately $285 million. This operation highlights the agency's ongoing efforts to combat financial crimes in the digital currency sector.

data.title: GameStop Shares Rise Amid Bitcoin Investment Consideration
data.description: According to Odaily, GameStop's stock increased by 6.7% in pre-market trading following reports that the company is contemplating investments in Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies.

data.title: AVE.AI Integrates BNBChain Launch Platform Four.meme
data.description: According to Odaily, the on-chain aggregation trading platform AVE.AI has successfully integrated the BNBChain launch platform Four.meme. This integration allows for on-chain internal market data filtering and one-stop trading on BNBChain, making AVE.AI the first aggregation trading platform to support both on-chain internal and external market trading on BNBChain. Previously, AVE.AI had enabled BNBChain full-chain Meme external market trading on its app, trading bot, and PC platform, supporting over 40 image dimensions and providing data support for BNBChain.

data.title: Bitget Wallet expands BGB token ecological applications and launches on-chain staking plan
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Wallet announced the expansion of Bitget Token (BGB) token ecological applications and launched the BGB on-chain staking plan, which provides higher returns than centralized staking while enhancing fund autonomy and privacy security. The first limited-time staking event will be open from 20:00 on February 14 to 20:00 on February 21 (UTC+8), with a staking pool size of 350,000 BGB. Users can participate in the 90-day staking event through Bitget Wallet and Bitget Exchange, and enjoy a 5% fixed annual return and a limited number of 20,000 Morph Point incentive points.
BGB is accelerating the expansion of on-chain and real-world application scenarios, focusing on decentralized transactions, staking to earn coins, and payment. Users can use BGB to pay multi-chain gas fees and simplify on-chain interactions; stake BGB to earn income, and support Bitget Wallet Card cashback and VIP benefits. In the past two months, the price of BGB has risen by 320%, and the market demand is strong. Starting from 2025, the platform will repurchase and destroy BGB every quarter to strengthen the deflation mechanism.

data.title: Bloomberg Launches Bitcoin and Gold Blend Indices
data.description: According to Odaily, Bloomberg has introduced the Bitcoin and Gold Blend Indices, a multi-asset index combining commodities and digital assets. This new offering includes the Bloomberg Bitcoin and Gold Equal Weight Index (BBIG) and the Bloomberg Dollar, Bitcoin, and Gold Equal Weight Index (BBUG). The indices allow clients to modify and customize weight configurations.

data.title: Hong Kong to Host Major Cryptocurrency and Web3 Events in 2025
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 14, the Managing Director of the Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Management Company, Mei Li Yuk-ha, announced plans to host several major exhibitions related to cryptocurrency and Web3 this year. These events are part of efforts to support Hong Kong's financial technology development. Among the scheduled events is Consensus Hong Kong 2025, set to take place on February 18, which is expected to attract over 8,000 professionals from the cryptocurrency, blockchain, and Web3 sectors, with 6,000 participants coming from various parts of the world. Additionally, the Hong Kong Bitcoin Conference is planned for August.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,700 USDT with a Narrowed 0.82% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 14, 2025, 11:07 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,700 USDT and is now trading at 2,698.939941 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.82% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: DIN Team Seeks Assistance After Losing Contact With Founder
data.description: According to Foresight News, the DIN team has been unable to contact its founder, Harold, for several hours. The team is currently seeking assistance from venture capitalists and media outlets. Harold had previously stated on his social media account that he was in Myanmar and had lost a multi-signature wallet and laptop. Despite concerns for his safety, the team has confirmed that the DIN token will be released as planned, having already secured approval from two-thirds of the multi-signature. The team is closely monitoring the situation and will provide updates as they become available.
